summary: Round 3 re-verification of revised tech-spec.md. Both Round 2 findings (CRITICAL cookieMaxAge invalid v9 option, MAJOR Decision 12 wrong rationale) are properly fixed across Decisions, Risks, AC, and Task descriptions. v9 API claims remain consistent with Context7-verified options. One residual leftover detected (line 18 architecture bullet still mentions 'та cookieMaxAge' in the integration summary) — minor cosmetic inconsistency with Decision 3/4 where cookieMaxAge is explicitly excluded; tech-spec is otherwise self-consistent. No new mirages introduced.

findings.claim: tech-spec line 18 (Architecture/What we're building) lists detectBrowserLanguage config as 'з explicit cookieKey: i18n_lang та cookieMaxAge'.
findings.reality: Decision 3 (line 83-84) and Decision 4 (line 89) and Task 2 (line 288) all now explicitly state cookieMaxAge is NOT passed (module default ~1y is used). AC line 262 also says 'TTL ~1y (module default)'. The architecture summary on line 18 contradicts the body of the spec — leftover residue from before the Round 3 rewrite.
findings.source: tech-spec.md line 18 (Architecture / What we're building / @nuxtjs/i18n module integration)
findings.fix: Drop 'та cookieMaxAge' from line 18, e.g. '...detectBrowserLanguage з explicit cookieKey: i18n_lang...'. Cosmetic; does not affect implementation since Task 2 description is the authoritative source for the implementer.

verified_claims: Round 2 critical FIX: cookieMaxAge removed from Decision 3 — line 83 now reads 'SameSite політика і MaxAge — module defaults: SameSite Lax, MaxAge ~1 рік'
Round 2 critical FIX: Decision 3 Rationale (line 84) explicitly states 'v9 detectBrowserLanguage не приймає cookieMaxAge як опцію' with Context7-verified option list
Round 2 critical FIX: Decision 4 config block (line 89) does NOT include cookieMaxAge; explicit note 'cookieMaxAge не передається — module default ~1 рік'
Round 2 critical FIX: AC line 262 reads 'TTL ~1y (module default)' — no cookieMaxAge assertion
Round 2 critical FIX: Task 2 description (line 288) explicitly says 'cookieMaxAge НЕ передаємо — module default ~1y'
Round 2 major FIX: Decision 12 title now 'LangSwitcher викликає setLocale(code) (auto-navigate)'
Round 2 major FIX: Decision 12 Decision (line 137) — 'setLocale робить auto-navigate на новий локалізований path' (matches v9 docs)
Round 2 major FIX: Decision 12 Rationale (line 138) — 'v9 canonical lang-switcher pattern — setLocale(code) standalone (verified via Context7 /websites/i18n_nuxtjs)'
Round 2 major FIX: Decision 12 Alternatives (line 139) — explicit navigateTo now framed as 'redundant (auto-navigate вже виконується)'
Round 2 major FIX: Architecture line 23 — 'await setLocale(code) (canonical v9 pattern: ... auto-navigate)'
Round 2 major FIX: How-it-works step 2 (line 43) — 'auto-navigate на локалізований path /en/auth/login (під prefix_except_default)'
Round 2 major FIX: Risks row line 242 — 'await setLocale(code) (canonical v9 pattern, atomic у модулі)' — no longer claims setLocale doesn't auto-navigate
Round 1+2 minor FIX: Decision 6 (line 101) — 'composable повертає функцію (named getRouteBaseName за конвенцією, тут локально alias-нута як getBaseName)' — naming clarified
v9 detectBrowserLanguage options used — useCookie/cookieKey/cookieSecure/cookieCrossOrigin/redirectOn/alwaysRedirect/fallbackLocale — all confirmed valid per Context7
Decision 5 allow-list = ['en'] only — uk stripped under prefix_except_default (correct per v9 docs)
useI18n() exposes te() — confirmed Vue I18n v11 API
useLocaleHead({ seo: true }) — correct v9 API
useRouteBaseName() returns function — confirmed v9
strategy: 'prefix_except_default' — confirmed v9
redirectOn: 'no prefix' — confirmed v9
